title: Prosperity Server
description: The server side mods used on the Prosperity server.
body:
A *blazingly-fast* Fabric server modpack intended for vanilla technical-servers. This modpack is focused on stability, performance, and features the essentials for running a Fabric server in addition to many extra features. 

Note that this pack is primarily intended to make running the [Prosperity](https://prosperity.vercel.app/) server a bit easier and support is not guaranteed.

## FAQ

**Q: What does this break?** The only known difference with vanilla-behavior is Starlight. Disable it if you want to do light suppression. Any other parity issues are bugs or a result of your configuration.

**Q: How *blazingly-fast* is this modpack really?** It maintains a steady 30 - 45 mspt with multiple world eaters and farms running, so it's pretty fast.

**Q: How does this compare to Paper, Pufferfish, and other performant software?** [I answered that here](https://youtu.be/euik1Zrs30w?list=TLPQMDkwODIwMjKPncfGCZW-zA).

**Q: I have a problem! Please help!** This modpack isn't really intended for general use, but you can still reach out to me on the [Discord](https://discord.gg/hfTxZ4XxYj).
